name: Hyperbolic Geometry
description: ℍⁿ, Poincaré model. Constant curvature −1. Isometries PSL(2,ℝ). Mostow rigidity.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: ℍⁿ hyperbolic\ncurv −1"]
    D2["Def: Poincaré disk\nconformal model"]
    D3["Def: Geodesic\ncircle orth to ∂"]
    D4["Def: Isom ℍ²\nPSL2ℝ"]
    T1["Thm: Upper half-plane\nℍ² ≅ disk"]
    T2["Thm: Geodesics\nsemicircles, vert lines"]
    T3["Thm: Area triangle\nπ−angle sum"]
    T4["Thm: Mostow rigidity\nclosed hyp n≥3"]
    T5["Thm: Margulis lemma\nthick-thin decomp"]
    D1 --> T1
    D2 --> T1
    D3 --> T2
    D4 --> T4
    T1 --> T3
    T4 --> T5
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    class D1,D2,D3,D4 definition
    class T1,T2,T3,T4,T5 theorem
